name: 02_xauusd_bb_rsi_mean_reversion_m15
hypothesis: XAUUSD M15 exhibits statistically reliable mean reversion when price closes outside a tight Bollinger Band with a simultaneous RSI extreme, provided volatility is in a mid regime (not in a trend-day blowoff). Reverting to the mid-band yields >2 PF with >200 trades over 3 years.

entry_rules.long: close < lower_BB(20, 2.0) AND RSI(7) < 12 AND prior_bar_low < lower_BB
entry_rules.short: close > upper_BB(20, 2.0) AND RSI(7) > 88 AND prior_bar_high > upper_BB

acceptance_notes: Reference scout card reports PF 1.51 / Sharpe 2.48 on EURUSD; XAUUSD M15 has larger edges. Target PF >= 2.0 with tighter RSI thresholds and ADX regime filter.
